title: sorghum scabriflorum
intro: Sorghum scabriflorum, also known as the desert broom, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sorghum family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sorghum scabriflorum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Sorghum scabriflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
